criteriaResults.criterion: Modal renders centered with semi-transparent backdrop overlay
criteriaResults.evidence: Playwright confirmed: fixed inset-0 flex items-center justify-center container, bg-black/50 backdrop, dialog visible

criteriaResults.criterion: Modal has compound components: Modal.Header, Modal.Body, Modal.Footer
criteriaResults.evidence: Header with title + close btn + border-b, Body with content, Footer with Cancel/Confirm + border-t all present

criteriaResults.criterion: Modal.Header includes close button (X) in corner
criteriaResults.evidence: button[aria-label=Close] with SVG icon found in dialog header
Dialog remains visible after clicking backdrop - overlay div intercepts click events, e.target !== e.currentTarget always true
Dialog not visible after Escape key press

criteriaResults.criterion: Focus is trapped inside modal when open
criteriaResults.evidence: Tab cycling keeps focus within dialog for focusableElements.length + 2 iterations
animate-fade-in/animate-modal-scale-in on open, animate-fade-out/animate-modal-scale-out on close, 200ms durations in tailwind config

criteriaResults.criterion: Modal body scrolls if content overflows viewport
criteriaResults.evidence: overflow-y-auto with max-h-[calc(100vh-200px)] present in modal body

criteriaResults.criterion: Toast component appears in bottom-right corner of viewport
criteriaResults.evidence: fixed bottom-4 right-4 container confirmed with bounding box near viewport edge

criteriaResults.criterion: Toast shows message, type icon (success=green, error=red, info=blue)
criteriaResults.evidence: All three types verified: green CheckCircle for success, red XCircle for error, blue Info for info

criteriaResults.criterion: Toast has close button (X) for manual dismiss
criteriaResults.evidence: button[aria-label=Close] found in toast, clicking it removes the toast
Toast gone after 3.5s wait; source uses setTimeout 3000ms

criteriaResults.criterion: Multiple toasts stack vertically with newest at bottom
criteriaResults.evidence: 3 toasts created, each with increasing Y position, flex-col container

criteriaResults.criterion: Toast has enter animation (slide up) and exit animation (fade out)
criteriaResults.evidence: animate-slide-up on entry, animate-fade-out before auto-dismiss

criteriaResults.criterion: Both components render via React Portal to document.body
criteriaResults.evidence: Modal and Toast container both NOT inside #root, confirmed in document.body via createPortal
0 console errors, build succeeds (tsc + vite build)

issues.title: Clicking backdrop does not close modal
issues.expected: Modal closes when clicking the semi-transparent backdrop overlay
issues.actual: Modal remains open because the overlay child div intercepts clicks, making e.target !== e.currentTarget
issues.evidence: Playwright test: dialog still visible after clicking (5,5). elementFromPoint returns bg-black/50 child div, not presentation parent

handoff.handoffNotes: Created defect subtask 5.2 to fix backdrop click. One-line fix: add pointer-events-none to the bg-black/50 overlay div in Modal.tsx line 146. 15/16 criteria pass; all Modal and Toast features work except backdrop click close.
